hero.headline:
41 Years Transforming Hudson Valley
Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than a mow-and-go crew. Red Cedar Landscapes brings four decades of certified expertise to every project — from custom hardscapes and tree care to full landscape design. Just tell us your vision, and we will build it.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Comprehensive Landscape &<br class="hidden md:block"> Tree Care Professionals
services.subtitle: From design to maintenance, Red Cedar handles every aspect of your outdoor space. Our ISA Certified Arborists and skilled crews deliver results that last for decades.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom outdoor living spaces designed around your lifestyle — patios, pergolas, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and water features. From concept sketches to finished installation.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Masonry
cards.description: Expert construction of patios, retaining walls, walkways, and stone features. We use premium materials from our own supply yard for lasting beauty and structural integrity.

cards.title: Tree Care & Arboriculture
cards.description: ISA Certified Arborists handling tree removal, pruning, disease control, and plant healthcare. Crane and lift equipment for safe, efficient large-scale operations.

cards.title: Land Clearing & Excavation
cards.description: Professional clearing, grading, drainage solutions, and site preparation for construction or landscaping. Heavy equipment operated by experienced, safety-certified crews.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Year-round lawn care including mowing, fertilization, weed control, seasonal cleanups, and snow management. Your property stays pristine in every season.

cards.title: Commercial Property Services
cards.description: Full-service landscape management for businesses, HOAs, and municipalities. Tailored maintenance programs, snow removal, and grounds management throughout the Hudson Valley.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Walk us through your property and share your vision. We will assess the site, discuss options, and provide an honest, detailed estimate — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Execute
steps.description: Our certified team handles every detail — design, permitting, material sourcing from our own nursery, and expert installation. You stay informed at every milestone.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Your transformed property is ready to enjoy year-round. We offer ongoing maintenance programs so your investment stays beautiful for decades to come.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Four Decades of Landscape Excellence — Not Shortcuts
about.description: Since 1985, Red Cedar Landscapes has been the Hudson Valley's trusted partner for landscape design, tree care, and property management. Led by President Steven Relyea and a team of ISA Certified Arborists, we bring the expertise, equipment, and craftsmanship that other companies simply cannot match. Our on-site nursery and supply yard means we control quality from material selection to final installation.

features.title: Certified & Safety-Trained Crews
features.description: Every crew member is trained through our STARS safety program. Our arborists hold ISA and CTSP certifications — the gold standard in tree care.

features.title: Own Supply Yard & Nursery
features.description: We source premium plants, stone, mulch, and soil from our own Wappingers Falls yard. Better materials, better prices, faster project timelines.

features.title: A+ BBB with Zero Complaints
features.description: Over 41 years of business and not a single BBB complaint. We stand behind every project with a commitment to doing things right the first time.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — just honest pricing from a company that has earned your trust since 1985.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with our workmanship, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have maintained an A+ BBB rating for over four decades because we never cut corners and we always stand behind our work. Your satisfaction is not just a promise — it is our 41-year track record.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I schedule a landscape project?
faqs.answer: For major design-build projects, we recommend reaching out 4-6 weeks in advance so we can plan properly. For tree services, maintenance, and smaller projects, we can usually schedule within 1-2 weeks. Emergency tree removal is available with same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project from design to installation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Red Cedar is a true full-service operation. We handle design, material sourcing from our own nursery, permitting when required, installation, and ongoing maintenance. One company, one point of contact, start to finish.

faqs.question: Are your arborists certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our arborists hold ISA (International Society of Arboriculture) certification and CTSP (Certified Treecare Safety Professional) credentials. These are the highest professional standards in the tree care industry.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Hudson Valley region including Wappingers Falls, Poughkeepsie, Beacon, Hyde Park, and throughout Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, and Columbia counties in New York. We also serve parts of Fairfield County, Connecticut.

faqs.question: Do you offer commercial landscape services?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide full commercial landscape management, grounds maintenance, and snow management for businesses, HOAs, municipal properties, and multi-site commercial clients throughout the Hudson Valley.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded our backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve grading and slope challenges that other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: David P.
testimonials.text: We were extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. They were courteous, professional, creative, and met our needs at all times. Our new patio and outdoor kitchen are stunning.

testimonials.name: Karen L.
testimonials.text: They were on time and did great work. Very professional. Outstanding customer service. I highly recommend Red Cedar for any tree or landscaping needs. They have been our go-to for over a decade.
